text.title: Traceability — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a weekly `TraceabilityReport` and the per-link repair suggestions.

antipattern.description: Repair suggestion with `approval_required: false` OR `reviewed_by` set by anything other than a human BA.
antipattern.reason: Violates r3. LLM/agent identifiers are not valid BA approvers.
Violates r4. Semantics must be preserved.

antipattern.description: Suggestion with `confidence > 0.9` AND only 1 alternative — risk of false high confidence.
antipattern.reason: High confidence with no alternatives suggests the LLM matched too eagerly; require ≥ 2 alternatives or downgrade confidence.

antipattern.description: Drift report emitted but matrix file unchanged AND repair suggestions ignored.
antipattern.reason: Reports without action create reporting theatre. Drift must route to a queue.

list.item: Cache tracker responses for < 24h with hash for diff stability.
Sort suggestions by descending confidence for BA review efficiency.
Roll up identical-cause drift (e.g. sprint cleanup deletes 12 tickets at once) into one repair set.
Tracker source hash captured in audit event.
PR raised if any suggestion exists.
